creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Ziaee from comment #8)
Regarding "a feature request which apparently only you want" I decided to do a search for "gstat sort" to see if anyone else was interested in this. It turns out that there's now a package in the ports tree (sysutils/gstat-rs) that lists as its first major feature:

---
The key differences are:

* gstat-rs supports sorting the disks using the '+', '-', and 'r' keys, and the
  "--sort" and "-r" command line options.
---

So it is probably fine to close this as "Overcome by events", although I would like to continue the meta-discussion either here or in direct email between you, Mark and myself.
